use_cases: Triggering form submissions and actions with customizable visual variants
Creating navigation buttons with link styling and hover states
Building accessible action buttons with keyboard focus indicators
Implementing destructive action buttons with high-contrast warning styling
Adding ghost-style buttons for secondary actions in toolbars and cards
ai_summary: A polymorphic Button component with CVA-powered variant system offering 6 styles (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes. Built with Radix UI Slot for flexible rendering, includes ring-based focus states and disabled opacity handling. Standard Tailwind ring utility patterns for focus-visible styling with smooth hover transitions.
